How It WorksWhat We MeasureBlogPractitionersLogin

Live healthier, longer

Improve metabolic health with CGM, comprehensive labs, and a personalized plan—from $288/yr.

How it works

Understand your health state in realtime, over time with expert guidance. Experience measurable health improvements.

Learn more
Step 1

Measure your true health

Get a full assessment of your current health through lab testing, blood sugar tracking, and our detailed, support-guided intake.

Step 2

Learn what matters

Receive specific guidance from clinicians on the markers you should focus on, and the lifestyle changes that will help you move them.

Step 3

Improve your health, repeat

Use the Levels app to follow your personalized plan, then re-test to see real, measurable changes— often within weeks.

A guided path, built for you

Our experts translate your health story into the actions to take and the targets to hit, so you can lower your specific risks, and build health that lasts for decades.

Heart Health

Build lifestyle habits that target inflammation and lipid markers, guided by your personalized health data.

mg/dL

Choose Your Path

Three memberships, one goal:
Your best health

  • 50-minute functional nutritionist session
  • Dedicated concierge support
  • Levels app and dashboard
  • Advanced AI health insightsFrom glucose & labs data
  • AI adaptive programs
  • Unlimited uploading of past bloodwork

80% of Levels members improve out
of range biomarkers

Trusted by 100,000+ members — many seeing life-changing results without medication.

79%

Lowered fasting insulin, reducing early risk for metabolic disease

Improved HbA1c, with many reversing prediabetes

Reduced triglycerides, most by 30 mg/dL or more
